race.comment: BONUS SEASON (4) is knocking on the door and looks nicely placed third up to break her maiden. She's been close up in two runs despite going under at short quotes and while the punters might be feeling burnt, she can improve again and draws for every hope. LET LILY LOOSE (8) is another coming off a narrow defeat at short odds last time, resuming with a solid placing at Bendigo as the $1.50 favourite. She draws perfectly this time around and is well placed to atone. TISSEYRE (10) was close up fresh at Geelong in the same race behind BONUS SEASON. She'll be fitter and can roll forward from a wide gate out to 1400m. DAME FLORENCE (5) was okay behind a smart winner on debut at Cranbourne in a small field and is open to improvement. KOKESHI (6) draws low and has minor claims.
